claim_text: Bank operations were disrupted on 8 May 2023.
Branch and ATM access returned in stages by 9 May according to BSI.
analyst_treatment: Attribute to BSI and do not treat as independently measured availability

claim_text: BSI reported branch, ATM, and mobile-banking services as normal on 11 May.
analyst_treatment: Attribute to BSI; retain OJK's 13 May progressive-normalization wording as separate evidence

claim_text: BSI reported indications of a cyberattack and temporary switch-off of several channels.
analyst_treatment: Accept the disclosed indication but do not infer attack vector or root cause

claim_text: A forensic audit was in progress and OJK requested that it be accelerated.
analyst_treatment: Use as evidence of an investigation action only; outcome is not public in the reviewed sources

claim_text: OJK's IT supervisory and examination team coordinated with BSI and evaluated the disruption source.
analyst_treatment: Use as evidence of regulator engagement

claim_text: BSI's year-end filing states that corrective action was taken and cybersecurity was enhanced.
analyst_treatment: Do not infer which controls changed or whether they operated effectively

claim_text: Management stated that the incident had no material impact on the bank's financial performance.
analyst_treatment: Present as management's materiality view rather than independent impact measurement

claim_text: Reuters reported LockBit's claim that customer account details had been published; BSI did not confirm the alleged leak in that report.
analyst_treatment: Keep clearly attributed and exclude from confirmed-fact counts

claim_text: The reviewed public sources do not disclose a final forensic root cause or confirmed initial-access vector.
analyst_treatment: Do not speculate about phishing vulnerabilities malware path or staff action

claim_text: The reviewed primary sources do not publish a verified count or complete inventory of affected personal-data records.
analyst_treatment: Do not present attacker-supplied numbers as verified

claim_text: The reviewed public sources do not contain control test workpapers audit results or evidence sufficient to conclude that specific internal controls were effective or ineffective.
analyst_treatment: Assess public observability only - not control effectiveness
